basic_details.job_title: NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Silchar (NIT Silchar) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on 02 June 2026 on the official website nits.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/WOMEN/PWD/EWS candidates will be as per Govt. of India Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E/M.Tech or B.E/B.Tech with GATE/NET in Electrical Engg./Electronics Engg./Electronics & Communication Engg./Computer Science and Engg./Electronics & Instrumentation Engg./Telecommunication Engg./Mechatronics Engg./Robotics Engg./Mechanical Engg.
qualification.details: M.E/M.Tech or B.E/B.Tech (with GATE/NET qualifying score) or equivalent with first class in aggregate in Electrical Engg./Electronics Engg./Electronics & Communication Engg./Computer Science and Engg./Electronics & Instrumentation Engg./Telecommunication Engg./Mechatronics Engg./Robotics Engg./Mechanical Engg.

salary_details.details: Rs. 25,000 per month consolidated for two years and Rs. 30,000 per month (SRF) in the 3rd year.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 19-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 19th June 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.E/M.Tech or B.E/B.Tech degree with a qualifying score in GATE/NET in relevant engineering disciplines such as Electrical, Electronics, Computer Science, and others listed in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Research Fellow post is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month for the first two years, which will be revised to Rs. 30,000 per month in the third year as a Senior Research Fellow (SRF).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NIT Silchar Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply via email by sending their complete bio-data and self-attested copies of required documents to the official email address mentioned in the advertisement before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will primarily be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Silchar is a contractual role. The duration and terms of the contract will be as per the project requirements and institute norms.

faq.question: Q9. Where is NIT Silchar located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Silchar is located in Silchar, Assam.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment drive is NITS/Dean(R&C)/ECE/695/02/2026.
